name: crawler_journey
description: Run a typed Crawler journey: chromiumoxide-driven sequence of goto + screenshot + dom_assert + detector_axis steps against a target URL. Captures runtime-DOM state (post-JS) at named viewports (390 / 768 / 1280 for the canonical responsive sweep). Use this for: visual regression baselines, runtime-detector audits (broken text / hidden elements / low contrast / overflow), pixel-by-pixel reproduction validation. Output lands in runs/<journey>-<timestamp>/. Per `[[crawler-stays-general-purpose]]`: the journey schema is consumer-agnostic.

journey.description: Path to the journey JSON file describing the steps.

headless.description: Run chromium headless. Always true in CI.

viewport.description: Override the journey's declared viewport. Format: 'WxH', e.g. '1280x900'.
